label: gpt-image-2
descriptiveGuide: This 35-minute full-body session covers compound movements: 3 sets of squats, bench press, and bent-over rows. Start with a weight you can lift for 8-10 reps with good form. Rest 90 seconds between sets and focus on controlled movement.
imagePrompt: Instructional illustration of a barbell back squat at bottom position, showing neutral spine, knees tracking over toes, hips back and down to parallel. Include arrows highlighting chest up, weight through midfoot/heels, and knee alignment. Minimal gym background, clean anatomical style, annotated form cues with arrows, no text banners.
